title: Signal Dry Bulk Annual Review 2022
summary:
A review of dry bulk freight fundamentals
The year ended with critical changes in grain flows due to geopolitical tensions between Russia and Ukraine. In parallel, the Chinese real estate crisis seriously impacted Capesize vessels, while the energy crisis drove up coal flows and Panamax freight rates. ‍ Amid the macroeconomic and geopolitical challenges, it is interesting to see that the volume of bulk cargo flows has remained stable over the past two years.
